name: Spotify: Music & Podcasts
description: Stream millions of songs, podcasts, and playlists from creators around the world anytime you want.

name: Discord: Talk & Hangout
description: Join servers, chat with friends, and hang out in voice channels built for communities and gaming.

name: Instagram: Reels & Photos
description: Share photos, upload reels, follow creators, and connect with friends through stories and messages.

name: Twitch: Live Streaming
description: Watch live gaming streams, esports events, music shows, and interactive creators in real time.

name: YouTube: Videos & Shorts
description: Explore videos, shorts, tutorials, livestreams, and entertainment from creators across the internet.

name: GitHub: Code Together
description: Collaborate on projects, manage repositories, and contribute to open-source software development.

name: Telegram: Fast Messaging
description: Send fast and secure messages, create groups, and share files with cloud-based messaging tools.

name: Steam: PC Game Hub
description: Buy, download, and play thousands of PC games while connecting with friends and gaming communities.
